banners.title: [SEED] System-wide announcement
banners.description: Test fixture: a global banner that should appear for every user regardless of location. Use this row to verify the global-scope leg of the warning-banner cascade.

banners.title: [SEED] Canada-wide advisory
banners.description: Test fixture: a country-anchored banner that should appear for any user with country=CA. Verifies the country leg of the cascade.

banners.title: [SEED] Quebec province-wide alert
banners.description: Test fixture: a state-anchored banner that should appear for any user with state=QC and country=CA. Verifies the state leg of the cascade.

banners.title: [SEED] Montreal water advisory
banners.description: Test fixture: a city-anchored banner that should appear only for users searching Montreal. Verifies the city leg of the cascade.
